The '''Pascwa''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that lived on [[Pii IV]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]]<ref name="Greel" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Pascwa were mentioned in "[[The Greel Wood Haven]]," a ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' source article written by [[Craig Robert Carey|C. Robert Carey]] and published in the [[May]] [[1995]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 6|sixth issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' magazine.<ref name="Greel" />
